name: componentsv2bridge
author: Taako
description: A companion bridge for AAA3A's EmbedUtils that converts existing embed payloads to Discord Components V2 and provides native Components V2 JSON/YAML commands and a Red-Web-Dashboard editor.
install_msg: ComponentsV2Bridge loaded. Install and load AAA3A's EmbedUtils to post its stored embeds, then use `[p]cv2`, `[p]cv2 json`, `[p]cv2 stored`, or the Red-Web-Dashboard page.
short: Bridge EmbedUtils payloads and stored embeds to Discord Components V2 from Discord or the dashboard.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store user data. Message layouts are parsed on demand and sent directly to Discord.
